revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing programmatically created pages and categories

revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Tone superscript/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Tone superscript/doc]][[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]]

#redirect[[en:Template:Tone superscript/doc]] [[Category:qq]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:qq]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Tone superscript/doc]][[Category:qq]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]]

#redirect[[en:Template:Tone superscript/doc]] [[Category:11]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Tone superscript/doc]][[Category:11]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]]

#redirect[[:en:Template:Tone superscript/doc]] [[Category:11]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Tone superscript/doc]][[Category:11]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:Tone superscript/doc]] [[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Tone superscript/doc]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23630749988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|tonesup}} {{Lua|Module:Tone superscript}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> == Usage == This template automatically formats numbers as superscript for romanization systems like [[:en:Wade–Giles|Wade–Giles]].
== Example == {{tlx|Tone superscript|Shuo1-wen2 chieh3-tzŭ4}} → {{tonesup|Shuo1-wen2 chieh3-tzŭ4}}.
== Tracking categories ==
* {{cat|Pages using Tone superscript with sup tags}}
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Chinese multilingual support templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
